author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Arc Raiders cog loaded. Try `[p]arc` or `[p]arc help`. Keys: `[p]arc key town hall`. Live embeds: `[p]arc notify add` then `[p]arc notify enable` — one updating embed per channel with an Update button.
name: ArcRaiders
short: Arc Raiders live rotations, alerts, and key lookup
description: Live map event schedule from MetaForge with persistent live embeds, manual refresh button, optional channel cleanup, key location lookup, and a fallback UTC table if the API is unavailable.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores guild settings for auto-update and notification channels. No personal user data is stored.
